title: Planning a Belleville kitchen remodel
message: Planning a kitchen remodel in Belleville? Start with the decisions that affect the scope most: layout changes, cabinet plan, countertops, flooring, lighting, plumbing, and your target timing. All-Pro welcomes clear project details and photos so Bill can review the right next step. Request a free estimate online or call 618-581-0676.
proof_note: Use a real All-Pro kitchen photo only after ownership and project details are confirmed.

title: O'Fallon kitchen project questions
message: O'Fallon homeowners: if a kitchen feels crowded, dated, or hard to use, tell us what needs to change before choosing finishes. Share the address, layout goals, timing, and photos. All-Pro will review the request and explain the next useful step for an estimate. Call 618-581-0676 or use the project page.
proof_note: Pair with an approved kitchen project photo or a clean branded service graphic.

title: Belleville bathroom remodel scope
message: A bathroom estimate is more useful when the wet-area problem is clear. Belleville homeowners can send photos and describe the tub or shower, waterproofing concerns, flooring, vanity, lighting, ventilation, and any accessibility goals. Start with All-Pro's local bathroom project page or call 618-581-0676.
proof_note: Use an approved bathroom or shower project photo with a factual caption.

title: O'Fallon bathroom project help
message: Thinking about a bathroom remodel in O'Fallon? Send the room photos, the main problem you want solved, preferred timing, and whether you are considering a full remodel or a focused tub/shower update. All-Pro will review the request and confirm the next step. Call 618-581-0676 or start online.
proof_note: Do not use stock work as if All-Pro completed it.

title: Plan a more useful Metro East backyard
message: A better backyard can combine practical pieces: drainage, low-maintenance planting, patio space, walkways, fencing, and room to gather. Metro East homeowners can send All-Pro the address, photos, and the way they want to use the space. We will review the project and identify the right estimate path. Call 618-581-0676.
proof_note: Use a real before-and-after set with the city and scope recorded.

title: Not sure who to call for a smaller project?
message: Not every home project is a full remodel. If you are in Belleville, O'Fallon, or the surrounding Metro East and need a practical repair or smaller improvement, send the details and photos. All-Pro will tell you whether it fits our current services and the right next step. Call 618-581-0676 or start online.
proof_note: Confirm the linked small-jobs page and current service availability before posting.

title: Construction crew opportunities in Belleville and O'Fallon
message: All-Pro is accepting applications for construction crew work around Belleville, O'Fallon, and the Metro East. We want dependable people with experience in remodeling, decks, landscaping, concrete, repairs, or related residential work. Listed pay is $25-$50 per hour depending on the role, demonstrated skill, tools, and experience. Review the opening and apply through the official page.
proof_note: Use the approved All-Pro hiring graphic. Keep the visible pay range and employment terms consistent with the job page.

title: Local subcontractors: introduce your business to All-Pro
message: All-Pro is building a Metro East network of established residential trade businesses for possible project and overflow opportunities. Kitchen, bathroom, deck, landscaping, concrete, fencing, roofing, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, and handyman companies can submit a free capability profile. This is not a promise of work; each opportunity and payment arrangement is reviewed separately and put in writing.
proof_note: Use an approved branded trade-network graphic. Do not describe subcontractors as hourly employees or promise projects.

title: Free Bill's List profile and local growth options
message: Owner-led Metro East home-service companies can introduce their business to Bill's List. Start with a free listing request, or ask about an affiliate page, website updates, local search content, and lead follow-up systems. Listings and referrals are reviewed, not guaranteed, and any paid service or referral relationship is disclosed clearly.
proof_note: Use a Bill's List branded graphic. Do not imply neutral ranking, guaranteed leads, or automatic approval.
